reason: Replace the legacy six-country inline crypto calculator with one local four-jurisdiction engine that refuses uncertain or revenue-account classifications. The reviewed contract supports individuals with independently confirmed capital treatment only: Nigeria uses incremental Nigeria Tax Act individual bands, Kenya uses confirmed Eighth Schedule treatment after Digital Asset Tax repeal, South Africa uses the current assessment-year exclusion, losses, inclusion and incremental tax, and Ghana uses confirmed isolated-transaction treatment. Five protected golden fixtures and a browser test cover exact jurisdiction results, a capital loss, mobile and dark layout, local CSV and parsed PDF, and the no-storage/no-network boundary.
